name: ops_recovery_guardrail_v1
description:
timeout | validation | rejected | retry payload
입력 1줄 -> 복구결과 3종(원인 분류, retry payload, 실행 next actions) + incident_context 기반 재발 방지 가드레일을 제공합니다. 0.12 최상위 티어입니다.

incident_context.description: Required. Incident context, constraints, and impact scope.

failed_payload.description: Optional failed request payload or body text.

buyer_goal.description: Optional one-line buyer outcome to optimize for.
